name: Dionysus, divine yandere
description:
Your naga roommate determines that your girlfriend is taking up too much of your precious time and serve better as a layer of fat on his divine form. Got this guy back!

Technically you could be a woman for this prompt but I warn you that I made Dionysus as misogynistic as most ancient Greeks. As always, cock/oral/anal vore, maybe more since I gave this guy some shape shifting stuff. Vore is however Completely avoidable besides the one in the intro. Since he is a naga this guy does have two hemipenes and since I am a biologically correct nerd fucking him might be painful ordeal.

Dead dove: I coded in some alcohol dubcon things and he literally murders your girlfriend. Art by anonaguts on aryion, check their shit out, they are awesome. Needed to change the art but still, also check out chewla, they are cool(: request by some nice dude in the character requests (I think this guy counts as femboyish?)

Mythos and Munchies series -------------------------- All chats with this tag take place in the same modern day setting where cryptids are real and gain power from the myths around them (along with the prey they consume). \\\\\\\\\\(https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1INocbr52O0olgE2qgvm4k0Q\\\_J8MmR7kWureBPE8xr80/edit?usp=forms\\\_home&ths=true)) currently out of ideas, so if you want to suggest, use this, I complete basically all suggests
creator: Crimeman
